violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Estblishment is to use the three compartment sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize until dish machine is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in the walk-in cooler and freezer have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The floors throughout the facility (primarily behind or under equipment) have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the prep area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicers) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicers were moved to 3-bay sink to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023

The presence of flying insects is not controlled as evidenced by accumulation of flying insects around the cloth/mop bucket area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023
